areas.label: Repository
areas.summary: GitHub repository, branches, worktrees, and active checkout state.

areas.label: MCP/API surface

areas.label: Runtime engine
areas.summary: Daemon, storage, graph execution, branch tasks, retrieval, and producers.

areas.label: Fantasy domain
areas.summary: The original long-running authoring domain and live concordance universe.

areas.label: Coding system
areas.summary: Agent-team coding, patch packets, tests, review gates, and repo-change execution.

areas.label: Patch loop
areas.summary: Public bug intake, investigation, gates, coding dispatch, release, and observation.

areas.label: Website
areas.summary: The tinyassets.io public showcase pages and local preview loop.

areas.label: Docs and plans
areas.summary: Design notes, audits, specs, execution plans, and idea pipeline.

areas.label: Packaging and ops
areas.summary: Plugin packaging, deploy scripts, uptime probes, and public-surface operations.

areas.label: Tests and CI
areas.summary: Regression tests, pre-commit invariants, CI workflows, and verification scripts.
